title: LOW INCOME UTILITIES DISCOUNT - 211info
text: ASHLAND MUNICIPAL UTILITY LOW INCOME UTILITIES DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers electric, water, and sewer discount program. The discount is 30% with a maximum of $400 each year. Participants must apply yearly. Program year is from July 1-June 30. 2245 Ashland Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Household income at or below 200% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Office: Tuesday/Friday 9am-1pm Email (541) 488-6004 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 488-6004 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Ashland Services: Discounted Electric Service Discounted Sewer Service Discounted Water Service Other Services Offered At This Location: UTILITIES - EMERGENCY HEAT ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ASHLAND MUNICIPAL UTILITY
